stage: Native MAXIM registration API integration scaffold with INTEGRATION-only deployment status
notes: Build dates must be carried forward on every materially changed MAXIM portal version so screenshots and feedback can be tied to the exact build under review. The MAXIM course/date selector reads docs/data/schedule_future.json and filters by the same public open/direct-booking rules used by the public scheduler. Schedule for Them now posts to the MAXIM Worker registration API path after an availability recheck, but the Worker/D1 route has not been deployed or production-verified. Persistent /go/ links, Skip, and View history remain INTEGRATION-only and are not live.
